title: Model Router — policy, profiles & live routing

segments.subtitle: agent-garrison · policy · profiles · live Stage-A routing · 2026-06-15

beats.caption: Policy → Role-to-Target: each role resolves to one concrete runtime target
beats.expectedScreen: the Model Router Policy tab, ROLE → TARGET (BALANCED) table: expert→cc-opus-high, standard→cc-sonnet-med, fast→cc-haiku-low, image/video→sec-gemini, review→sec-codex

beats.caption: One shared matrix maps every task-type × tier to a role — authored once, used by all Profiles
beats.expectedScreen: the MATRIX (TASK-TYPE × TIER → ROLE) grid: rows code/review/research/image/video/writing/ops/other across T0-trivial, T1-standard, T2-deep

beats.caption: Switch the Profile to premium — same policy, the role map re-resolves to premium targets
beats.expectedScreen: the heading now reads ROLE → TARGET (PREMIUM); the role→target selects have updated for the premium profile

beats.caption: Switch to economy — expert now maps to a LOCAL ollama target (cc-ollama-qwen), zero cloud spend
beats.expectedScreen: the heading reads ROLE → TARGET (ECONOMY); the expert row's target is now cc-ollama-qwen, a local ollama runtime-target

beats.caption: Back to the balanced Profile for a live route
beats.expectedScreen: the heading reads ROLE → TARGET (BALANCED) again

beats.caption: Simulator: classify a real prompt live (haiku), then resolve the role → the concrete target
beats.expectedScreen: the Simulator tab after running a prompt: a result line reading taskType=code tier=T2-deep role=expert via=cell, plus [route: cc-opus-high | rule: cell:code/T2-deep | profile: balanced]

actions.text: write unit tests for the auth module

beats.caption: Compiled: the exact routing.md block the gateway injects into the operative's prompt
beats.expectedScreen: the Compiled tab showing COMPILED ROUTING.MD with the garrison:routing v1 markdown for the active profile

beats.caption: Telemetry: every routing decision is logged — this is the signal the Improver learns from
beats.expectedScreen: the Telemetry tab showing a DECISIONS panel with a target-hits breakdown

segments.caption: The same resolution over the live config API — active profile + role→target for each cell
segments.expectedScreen: terminal: active profile balanced, profiles balanced/economy/premium, then code/T2-deep→expert→cc-opus-high, review/T1→review→sec-codex, image/T1→image→sec-gemini

segments.text: Routing: visible policy, swappable profiles, live classification
segments.subtitle: role → target · matrix authored once · economy goes fully local
